strengths: Extensive fullstack experience across TypeScript, React, Node.js, and REST APIs
Proven ability to own end-to-end systems, from backend services to mobile apps
Strong track record of open-source contributions and technical teaching
concerns: No explicit mention of PostgreSQL, Nest.js, or relational database work — core required skills
Primary recent work involves AI-agent tooling and DLang, not renewable energy or construction tech domains
German language proficiency is listed as 'Basic' despite high on-site presence requirement in Berlin

key_factors.factor: Domain Alignment with Renewable Energy / Construction Tech

response.justification: Despite broad fullstack experience, the candidate lacks direct exposure to PostgreSQL, Nest.js, and relational databases — all required — while his recent work centers on AI-agent infrastructure and DLang, not the renewable energy or construction tech domain; additionally, his basic German proficiency poses a significant risk given the high on-site collaboration requirement in Berlin.
